creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 206763
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.28.2 builds. (Also does the style fixes and clean up)

Looks like www/cliqz got updated from 1.28.1 to 1.28.2. 

The patch has been regenerated to include the update, along with all the other changes described above.
